summary: Iteration 48 — Verified the ModelNamePicker '(default)' option fix for the testing_agent_bench Model Name override in the New Eval modal. All 5 scenarios PASS: '(default)' row exists at top of dropdown, clears the pre-filled model, checkmark renders correctly, real models can still be selected, custom aliases still commit, and submit succeeds with no error banner when '(default)' is selected.
critical_code_review_comments: ModelNamePicker.js correctly prepends DEFAULT_MODEL_OPTION '(default)' to the option list (line 38) and maps it back to '' on commit (line 42), so the harness/agent default is omitted when the user picks (default). Value normalization uses `value || DEFAULT_MODEL_OPTION` (line 41) which gracefully handles both empty and pre-filled cases.

Combobox.jsx generates data-testid per option as `${testId}-opt-${opt}` — '(' and ')' chars are present in the testid string for the (default) row (eval-testing-model-override-opt-(default)). Playwright handled this fine via exact-string selector; no escaping issues observed.
seed_data_creation: Submitted 1 minimal eval job: group TEST_default_picker_1782803023 — 1 testing_agent_bench problem × 1 agent (full_stack_app_builder_cloud_v8_sonnet_4_5), model_name omitted (default).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified scenarios in detail: (1) Step 1 dataset-type-filter='Testing Agent Bench' → 34 dataset items. Picked first item; advanced to Step 2. (2) ta-extra-options-trigger expand reveals eval-testing-model-override-trigger; for the chosen dataset the pre-filled label was already '(default)' (this dataset has no attributes.model_name — pre-fill is dataset-dependent and not a bug). Opening the dropdown shows 7 rows: (default), supernova, gpt-5.3-codex, gemini-3-pro-preview, gpt-5.2-codex, claude-opus-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-5. (3) Clicking eval-testing-model-override-opt-(default) sets trigger to '(default)' with check icon opacity-100 on the row. (4) Picking 'supernova' updated trigger to 'supernova'; switching back to '(default)' worked. (5) Custom alias 'my-custom-alias-xyz' typed into eval-testing-model-override-input committed via eval-testing-model-override-custom-commit row, trigger updated. (6) Setting model back to '(default)', group=TEST_default_picker_1782803023, agents pre-populated '1 agent selected', clicked submit-eval-button on Step 3. Success toast 'Submitted 1 eval job(s)' shown; submit-error-banner count = 0. Group appears at top of Eval Runs list with 1 job. Zero console errors during the entire flow.
rca of the issue: N/A — fix verification only. The fix at ModelNamePicker.js (DEFAULT_MODEL_OPTION sentinel + bidirectional mapping to/from '') and its wiring in RunEvalModal works as designed end-to-end including final submit.
